prompt: Run vlamguard on the helm chart in charts/vlamguard and fix whatever it finds. Open a PR with the results.

assertions.name: json_output_flag
assertions.description: Uses --output json flag when running vlamguard check

assertions.name: rerun_after_fix
assertions.description: Plan includes re-running VlamGuard after applying fixes to verify

assertions.name: before_after_scores
assertions.description: PR body template includes before/after risk score and grade comparison

assertions.name: feature_branch
assertions.description: Creates a fix/vlamguard-* branch, does not commit to main

assertions.name: checks_addressed_table
assertions.description: PR body includes a table showing which checks went from FAIL to PASS
